comments_critique.summary: The discussion revolves around the effectiveness and relevance of bzip compared to newer compression algorithms like xz and zstd. Commenters share personal experiences, technical insights, and critiques of the article's claims about bzip's performance.

comments.author: saghm
comments.text: Early on the article mentions that xz have zstd have gotten more popular than bzip, and my admitted naive understanding is that they're con...
comments.analysis: This comment provides a well-reasoned critique of the article's failure to address the reasons behind bzip's declining popularity.

comments.text: Just use zstd unless you absolutely need to save a tiny bit more space. bzip2 and xz are extremely slow to compress.
